purpose: Thin per-deposit INDEX into the recovered external metadata for this deposit's legacy Zenodo DOIs. The actual records live in the bulk data stores under data/ (openalex-severed-recovery.json, zenodo-xml-pretermination-2026-06-07.tar.gz, datacite-full-backup.json, datacite-survivors-multi-heteronym.json). Sidecars do not duplicate those records — they map each covered DOI to its identifier in each store.

10.5281/zenodo.19013315.title: THE SPACE ARK: EA-ARK-01 v4.2.7 — Mobile Ontological Operating System of the Crimson Hexagonal Architecture

10.5281/zenodo.19822790.title: EA-HET-01: Heteronymy Is a Function, Not a Name — Trust-Marker Laundering, Alias Capture, and Functional Provenance

10.5281/zenodo.20686759.title: Revelation First: A Work Plan for Retrieval-Layer Theological Reception (EA-LOGOS-REVFIRST-PLAN v1.2, Claim 6)

10.5281/zenodo.20687922.title: MPAI: The Josephus Thesis — Disambiguation, Evidentiary Tiering, and Available-Reading Framing (EA-MPAI-JOSEPHUS-01 v1.0)

10.5281/zenodo.20684762.title: Term-State Registry: A Governance Instrument for Tracking Coined Terms Through Composition-Layer Lifecycle (EA-SEI-TERMSTATE-01 v1.0)

10.5281/zenodo.20686319.title: SPXI Self-Audit Protocol: Embedded Provenance Verification for Composition-Layer Retrieval (EA-SPXI-SELFAUDIT-01 v1.0)

openalex.lookup: records[].doi == this DOI; openalex_id is the W-prefixed OpenAlex Work ID

zenodo_bulk_xml.lookup: extract <record_id>.xml from the tarball where record_id is the digits after 'zenodo.'

datacite_survivor_sweep.lookup: search records[].attributes.doi == this DOI across orcid_records, name_records, sigil_records, vox_records, feist_records
